utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all details as requested: each item must include the type of coverage and costs. 1) health_coverage: explicitly states physical and mental health coverage and provides costs for primary and backup. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: states home/contents insurance with costs; primary says included in total package (ties to €600), backup has €60/month and some detail (replacement value, €1000 electronics). Adequate. 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance present with costs; primary included in €600, backup €100/month. Adequate. 4) additional_services: enhancement services with costs; described and costs noted as included. Adequate. 5) total_budget: provides monthly/annual cost breakdown, including current spend and optimized options. Fully specified. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists options primarily labeled as 'GlobalTech Corporate Package' and 'LifeFirst Standard...' across health, property, travel, and additional services. In the ground-truth ratings, 'GlobalTech Corporate Package' does not appear, so it cannot be mapped. 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' appears in health (physical and mental) with rating 8, and in travel insurance with rating 7. 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' appears under property (home_content) with rating 8. Therefore, map only the LifeFirst items from the plan to their corresponding ratings.
